# Ralph progress log (append only — do not edit past entries)

Format:
## YYYY-MM-DD — Issue #N — Title
- What was implemented
- Tests run
- Commit: <hash or branch>

---

## 2026-05-22 — Issue #1 — Lenient filters + rank penalty for unknown stipend/duration
- Added `FilterPolicy` (strict/lenient) for stipend, duration, role, geo, and optional PPO hard filter
- Wired policy into `InternshipScraper`, CLI `--lenient`, `AgentSettings`, and `RankingEngine`
- Zero/unknown stipend gets rank score 0 (penalty) while lenient mode keeps listings in the funnel
- Tests: `./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q` — pass
- Commit: 28c4e49

## 2026-05-22 — Issue #2 — Hybrid cache replay (no sample fallback by default)
- Cache replay when live post-filter is empty (`--live` skips replay)
- Preserve cache when live raw is empty; sample fallback gated behind `--allow-sample-fallback`
- Tests: `./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q` — pass
- Commit: b7163d0

## 2026-05-22 — Issue #3 — discover and shortlist CLI run profiles
- Added `RunProfile` presets and `discover` / `shortlist` subcommands with override-friendly flags
- Extended `AgentSettings` with `rich_reports` (shortlist on by default)
- Documented commands in `docs/CLI.md`
- Tests: `./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q` — 29 passed
- Commit: 9add8b6

## 2026-05-22 — Issue #4 — Dual Ollama model routing (fast vs large)
- Added `OllamaRouter` with fast (`qwen2.5:3b`) and large (`qwen2.5:7b`) clients
- `JDParser` → fast; `CompanyResearcher` → large; CLI `--ollama-fast-model` / `--ollama-large-model`
- Tests: `./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q` — pass
- Commit: c60a905

## 2026-05-22 — Issue #5 — Rich LLM coaching reports
- Added `CoachingGenerator` facade: templates by default, large-model coaching when `rich_reports`
- Wired into pipeline; skill gaps remain rule-based; graceful LLM fallback
- Tests: `./venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q` — 42 passed
- Commit: 32e20c2
